text: Literally, ‘will find her’. Grammatically, this might refer to ‘innocence’, but it is fairly certain we are meant to think of Wisdom, alluded to in 14.22 above.
‘This wisdom lackest thou?’; according to the Greek text, ‘Hast thou rebelled against him?’
The rendering given above is an attempt to combine the Greek and the Latin versions, either of which, taken by itself, is untranslatable.
